name: Dawn Rose
notes: Originally a fishing vessel, converted to cargo use.

name: Gilt Blades
notes: Captain's quarters. Portuguese-style. Manageable with reduced crew of 5.

name: Wold Anchor
notes: Similar to Gilt Blades but less refined. Hidden compartment.

name: Sovi
notes: Likely former slaver vessel. Large enough for 23 passengers plus crew. No luxury fittings.

name: Shalindra
notes: Not Dawn Blades property. Allied vessel. Essavane captaining.

name: Revivify
ownership: deeded to Order of Solmir, Dawn Blades occupy
notes: Former Kreel residence. Marcus managing, Miren and Dav assisting. Common room, kitchen, multiple sleeping areas. Workshop space still needed.

name: Overflow Warehouse
ownership: seized Syndicate front, deeded to Dawn Blades

name: The Winery at Fogstone Hill
furnishings_notes: Furs: bearskin (80g), 2x wolf (50g each), seal fur for Sovi already delivered (40g). 15x pillows held until estate visit to match colors. Study renovation 9 days out (370g): floor-to-ceiling shelving, three lockable dual-key cabinets, new desk, two visitor chairs, curtains, rugs, cushioning, reading lamp, few considered objects. Beds pending carpenter assessment on estate visit. Upstairs and outbuilding assessment pending follow-up, options at different price points.
notes: 3 miles northeast of Khemrise. Main house, east outbuilding, stable, courtyard, vineyard rows. Ledwent managing. Primary base of operations.

name: Khemrise Strongbox
ownership: registered under assumed name, Salt Hook address
notes: Merchant's Bank of Khemrise. Contains ~39,000g negotiable notes, three property deeds, correspondence files, Harwick's signed confession, Belverbridge payment schedule letter.

name: Marchant Wool Imports
ownership: acquired from Syndicate shell, legitimate operation retained
notes: Real wool trading operation with genuine clients and good regional reputation. Syndicate used as money laundering pass-through only — the wool business itself is legitimate and profitable. Rendwick Pendwick being approached as operator.

name: Filas Apothecary
ownership: Dawn Blades own the building, Prestiria Filas operates
notes: Real apothecary, legitimate pharmacist Prestiria Filas who didn't know Syndicate owned the building. Solid client base, real medicines. Tova handling ownership transition professionally. Supplier relationship with Trevash herb merchant worth monitoring — Aldric and Pell checking for Syndicate ties.

name: Fourth Warehouse
notes: Location known to Vaz specifically. Revealed by Fennick.

name: Loan Dragon
notes: Reformed loan shark operation. Jessyl Denmar manages, Big Tam and Gritch enforce.

name: Long Arm Trading
ownership: Dawn Blades partner, 16% cut to Helena Sable
notes: Aldren Casvath funded 15,000g. Helena Sable 16% partner. Overflow warehouse potential LA Trading property.

name: Khemrise Winery
ownership: Dawn Blades, operates from Vineyard Estate
notes: East outbuilding converting for wine aging long term. Aldric Foss supplying barrels.

name: Farendale House
notes: Title transfers eighth bell tomorrow. Not completely furnished. Two minute walk from Revivify.
